home.subtitle: What would you like to record today?
home.noRecordings: No recordings yet. Start a new session!

⚠️ Microphone access denied.

Would you like to open System Settings now?
home.micPermissionDeniedSystem:
⚠️ Microphone access denied.

Please enable microphone permission for the app in System Settings.
home.micNotFound:
⚠️ No microphone found.

Please connect a microphone and try again.

importAudio.title: Import Audio
importAudio.description: The audio has been imported successfully. You can rename it before starting the transcription.

importConversation.title: Import external conversation
importConversation.largeFileWarning: The file exceeds 50KB. AI may not be able to process it completely. Continue?
importConversation.noSegments: Could not extract segments from the conversation. Verify the file contains a valid conversation.
importConversation.noProvider: No AI provider configured. Set one up in Settings before importing.

pasteConversation.title: Paste conversation
pasteConversation.description: Paste the text of a conversation. AI will identify speakers, timestamps, and structure.

recordButton.errorNoMic: Please select a microphone in settings

recordingOverlay.confirmDiscardMessage: All data from this recording will be lost.
recordingOverlay.extraInstructionsPlaceholder: E.g.: Sprint planning meeting with the frontend team. Focus on technical decisions and task assignments...

settings.title: AIRecorder Settings
settings.subtitle: Settings
settings.description: Manage your app preferences and AI configurations.

helpText.theme: Choose the visual theme: light, dark, or follow the system setting.
helpText.uiLanguage: Language in which the application is displayed.
helpText.fontSize: Adjusts the font size for chats, transcriptions and summaries.
helpText.recentMeetings: How many recent recordings are shown in the project summary highlights.
helpText.microphone: Select the input device for your recordings.
helpText.whisperModel: Choose the default model for new transcriptions. Smaller models are faster but less accurate.
helpText.cpuThreads: More threads increase transcription speed but use more computer resources.
helpText.ragModel: Specific model for answering RAG queries (e.g.: deepseek-r1). Leave empty to use the main model.
helpText.generalModel: Model used for summaries, analysis and processing tasks.
helpText.chatModel: Model used for chat conversations. If empty, the General Model will be used.
helpText.embeddingModel: Model used for indexing and searching fragments (e.g.: nomic-embed-text).
helpText.databasePath: Change where the database is stored. Default location is recommended.
helpText.contextLengthInput: Leave empty to detect automatically on each generation, or enter the value manually.
helpText.contextLengthOllama: Find it by running: ollama show <model> --verbose (num_ctx field)
helpText.contextLengthLmStudio: Find it in LM Studio, under "My Models" → advanced options of the loaded model.

messages.checkUpdatesDefault: Check if a newer version is available
messages.modelError: Could not load models. Check your API Key.

notifications.title: Desktop Notifications
notifications.desc: Show native notifications when tasks complete

autoTranscribe.title: Auto-Transcribe
autoTranscribe.desc: Automatically start transcription when a recording is saved

autoAnalyze.title: Auto AI Analysis
autoAnalyze.desc: Automatically generate AI summaries and insights when transcription finishes

micAccess.title: Microphone Access
micAccess.desc: Required to record your voice during meetings.

kofi.title: Support the project
kofi.desc: AIRecorder is free and open source. If you find it useful, consider supporting its development.

misc.directoryNotSupported: Directory selection is not supported in this environment
misc.changeDbAskMigrate: Do you want to copy the current database to the new location?

integrations.title: Chat Platforms
integrations.description: Connect your accounts to sync conversations into your projects.
integrations.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect this account? Linked channels will also be removed.
integrations.credentialsHelp: Create an app in the provider console to get these credentials.

google-chat.name: Google Chat
google-chat.description: Sync messages from your Google Chat spaces.
google-chat.help: Create a project in Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials → Desktop app.

teams.name: Microsoft Teams
teams.help: Register an app in Azure Portal → App registrations → type «Desktop application».

channelPicker.title: Link channel to chat
channelPicker.noConnections: No connected accounts. Go to Settings → Integrations to connect a platform.

aiQueue.title: Process Monitor
aiQueue.subtitle: Track and manage your AI tasks.
aiQueue.noTaskData: No data saved for this task.

projects.title: Projects Library
projects.emptyDesc: Create your first project to organize your recordings
projects.name: Name
projects.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this project?
projects.subtitle: Manage and organize your audio sessions.
projects.changeProjectText1: The recording "{{recordingName}}" is already assigned to project "{{currentProjectName}}".
projects.changeProjectText2: Do you want to move it to "{{newProjectName}}"?
projects.deleteProjectConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? Recordings will not be deleted.
projects.unassignConfirm: Are you sure you want to unassign "{{recordingName}}" from project "{{projectName}}"?

overview.placeholder: Add context for this recording: topic, key participants, goals...
overview.noInstructions: No extra instructions. Click Edit to add context.
overview.aiExtracting: AI is extracting insights, summaries, and participants.
overview.noTranscriptionDesc: AI needs the transcription to generate the summary and key topics.

newSessionCard.title: New Session
newSessionCard.description: Start recording instantly. Our AI will handle transcription, summarization, and key point extraction automatically.
newSessionCard.importConversationDescription: Upload files or paste text. AI will normalize the format automatically.
newSessionCard.importAudioDescription: Upload audio files (mp3, wav, ogg...) to transcribe.

transcriptionQueue.title: Live Processing Queue
transcriptionQueue.subtitle: Managing {{count}} active tasks
transcriptionQueue.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this task?

finish.title: You're All Set!
finish.subtitle: AIRecorder has been successfully configured. You are ready to start recording and transcribing your meetings with the power of AI.
finish.changeNote: You can change these settings later in the preferences menu.

welcome.title: Welcome to
welcome.subtitle: Your intelligent recording assistant
welcome.description: Record meetings, automatically transcribe and extract insights with AI.
welcome.terms: By continuing, you agree to our

mic.title: Microphone Setup
mic.desc: We'll test your input device for optimal recording quality.

ai.title: AI Customization
ai.desc: Tailor the transcription engine to recognize your voice patterns.

workspace.title: Workspace Organization
workspace.desc: Setup where your projects and transcripts will live.

ai.title: Configure your AI Intelligence
ai.subtitle: Choose how AIRecorder processes your audio. You can change this later in settings.
ai.betaWarning: Cloud providers are currently in beta testing. Some features may not work as expected.

ollama.subtitle: Self-hosted processing
ollama.description: Run AI entirely on your machine. Ideal for total privacy and offline workflows, but requires powerful hardware.
ollama.chatModelHelp: For chat conversations. Empty = uses General Model.

lmstudio.subtitle: Self-hosted processing
lmstudio.description: Run GGUF models via LM Studio's local server. Provides a simple GUI for downloading and managing models.
lmstudio.urlNote: * Default URL. You can change this in the app settings later.

gemini.description: Google's Gemini models. Requires a Google AI Studio API key.

kimi.description: Kimi models by Moonshot AI. Requires a Moonshot API key.

deepseek.description: DeepSeek models. Requires a DeepSeek API key.

permissions.title: Enable Permissions
permissions.subtitle: To record and transcribe your audio accurately, AIRecorder needs access to your system devices. We value your privacy and only record when you tell us to.
permissions.micDesc: Required to record your voice during meetings.
permissions.systemAudioDesc: System audio capture is handled automatically. No additional permissions required.
permissions.notifDesc: Get alerts when transcription is ready.
permissions.themeDesc: Choose the visual theme of the app.

storage.title: Configure Storage
storage.subtitle: Choose where to save your recordings and database. You can use the default values.

aiInfo.title: The power of AI on your machine
aiInfo.subtitle: AIRecorder uses local Artificial Intelligence models to guarantee 100% privacy for your transcripts and summaries. No data ever leaves your computer.
aiInfo.whatIsLocalAiDesc: Instead of sending your audio to external company servers (like OpenAI or Google), we process the information using tools installed on your own machine.
aiInfo.ollamaDesc: The easiest way to run models in your terminal. Highly recommended for its ease of use.
aiInfo.lmstudioDesc: Powerful graphical interface for downloading and managing advanced GGUF models.
aiInfo.normalModelsDesc: Responsible for reading your transcripts, generating summaries, meeting minutes, and answering your questions in the chat.
aiInfo.embeddingModelsDesc: They convert your texts into mathematical coordinates. This allows the AI to quickly "search" through all your past recordings (RAG) to give you accurate answers.
aiInfo.docsNote: Will open in your web browser
aiInfo.noInstallDesc: We recommend pausing for a moment, following our guide, and installing Ollama before continuing.

speakers.title: Speakers
speakers.disabledDesc: Enable diarization in Settings to identify and manage speakers.
speakers.emptyState: No speakers identified yet. Record and transcribe meetings to get started.
speakers.mergeModalDesc: Select the source speaker (will be removed) and the target (will keep the data from both).
speakers.mergeTargetPlaceholder: Select speaker to receive the data...
speakers.mergeConfirmDesc: All recordings and embeddings will be reassigned. The speaker "{{source}}" will be permanently deleted.
speakers.sameSpeakerError: Source and target cannot be the same speaker

speakerDetail.title: Speaker Detail
speakerDetail.noRecordings: This speaker does not appear in any recording.
speakerDetail.notFoundDesc: The speaker may have been deleted.
speakerDetail.mergeConfirm:
Merge "{{source}}" into "{{target}}"?

All recordings and embeddings will be reassigned.
speakerDetail.mergeConfirmRich:
Merge "{{source}}" into "{{target}}"?

All recordings and embeddings will be reassigned.
speakerDetail.deleteEmbeddingConfirm: Remove the relation with "{{recording}}"? This will delete the embedding and the speaker's association with that recording.

mode.title: Specialty Mode
mode.description: Select how you want the AI to interpret and process recordings. The active mode affects all summaries, key points, tasks and chat.

customize.title: Customize: {{expert}}
customize.description: Configure extra instructions that will be injected with maximum priority into each feature. Leave empty to use the expert's standard behavior.

general.name: General
general.description: No fixed specialty. Neutral and adaptable to any type of conversation or professional context.

developer.name: Developer
developer.description: Geared toward software development teams. Optimized for technical meetings, code and architecture.

psychologist.name: Psychologist
psychologist.description: Geared toward mental health professionals. Clinical, empathetic and ethical tone.

base.label: Expert Base Prompt
base.hint: Defines the core behavior of the expert. Edit the text directly to adjust the tone, focus and vocabulary of ALL features. Restore original to go back to the factory text.

shortSummary.label: Short Summary
shortSummary.hint: Instructions applied only when generating the short summary. Example: "Always include the patient's name and session date at the beginning."
shortSummary.placeholder: E.g.: Prioritize decisions made and agreed next steps...

longSummary.label: Long Summary
longSummary.hint: Instructions applied when generating the detailed summary of the recording.
longSummary.placeholder: E.g.: Always include a separate 'Identified risks' section...

keyPoints.label: Key Points
keyPoints.hint: Instructions for key point extraction. Example: "Limit points to concrete clinical decisions, don't mention administrative aspects."
keyPoints.placeholder: E.g.: Each point should start with the responsible person's name...

chat.label: Chat
chat.hint: Additional instructions for the chat assistant. Applied in both RAG mode and classic mode.
chat.placeholder: E.g.: Always respond in list format when there is more than one element...

tasks.label: Task Generation
tasks.hint: Instructions for automatic task generation from the transcription.
tasks.placeholder: E.g.: Tasks should always have an assigned owner and an estimated date...

tab.title: Notes
tab.empty: No notes generated for this recording yet.

actions.deleteConfirm: Delete this note? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Note Templates
settings.deleteConfirm: Delete this template? Notes generated with it will be preserved.

one-on-one.name: 1:1 Meeting
one-on-one.description: One-on-one meeting with achievements, concerns and actions

customer-interview.name: Customer Interview
customer-interview.description: Pain points, quotes, JTBD and next steps

sales-discovery.name: Sales Discovery
sales-discovery.description: BANT qualification with objections and next step

daily-journal.name: Daily Journal
daily-journal.description: Daily reflection with mood, gratitude and focus areas

lecture-notes.name: Lecture Notes
lecture-notes.description: Topics, definitions, examples and open questions

brainstorm.name: Brainstorm
brainstorm.description: Idea pool, themes, top picks and risks
